description: Prize and easter-egg inventory for the Three Doors / Kingdome of Hearts game. Each prize has an unlock condition linked to a challenge.

prizes.name: Crown of the Kingdome
prizes.description: A crown made of tangled vines and blinking cursors. Worn by those who hear the King's question and answer with truth.

prizes.name: Speedwalker
prizes.description: You reached the Kingdome in four choices or fewer. The fox had to run to keep up.

prizes.name: Lorekeeper
prizes.description: You have walked through every sub-door the Kingdome offers. The Storybook knows your name.

prizes.name: Glitch Hunter
prizes.description: You saw what should not be seen. The XP Door remembers you.

prizes.name: Xenon Navigator
prizes.description: You have witnessed convergence and stood at the end of time. The stars know your path.

prizes.name: Synthesasia in Threes
prizes.description: Pattern recognized across three domains. You see in threes the way the King sees in hearts.

prizes.name: First Steps
prizes.description: You entered the Moss Door. Every journey begins with a single green light.
